headline: Leidos (LDOS) Stock Looks Cheap On Value Checks But Weak On Returns
summary: Leidos Holdings has had a difficult start to 2026, with the stock down 41.7% year to date, yet the broader valuation checks still point to a company that screens as undervalued on several measures. Year to date, Leidos Holdings has fallen 41.7%, which puts recent sentiment under pressure even as longer term returns over three and five years remain positive. Partnerships that apply artificial intelligence to defence logistics may support expectations for future cash generation, while any...
